title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on the street in concrete jungle】

jazz funk.rare groove.acid jazz

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Ghetto: Misfortune's Wealth – 24-Carat Black" into "Liverpool Medley: Liverpool Eight/Children of the Ghetto/Stanhope Street – The Real Thing".

Please enjoy the connection between the two songs, which have an underground atmosphere.

今回は「GHETTO: MISFORTUNE'S WEALTH - 24-CARAT BLACK」から「Liverpool Medley: Liverpool Eight/Children of the Ghetto/Stanhope Street · The Real Thing」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
アンダーグラウンドな空気感を含んだ二つの楽曲の繋ぎをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GQq7p8pyv2E
